description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
- Fixed invisible context menus blocking input after closing
- Fixed Favorites sidebar heart icon alignment
- Fixed Scan ReplayGain menu labels in related album sections
- Fixed readability issues on the Lyrics page with light album artwork
- Fixed artist discographies incorrectly including featured appearances
- Fixed scrollbar positioning in Songs, Artists, Playlists, Favorites, and Folders views
- Fixed Settings scrollbar hover artifacts
- Fixed Lyrics color picker staying open indefinitely
- Fixed profile name field remaining focused after pressing Enter
- Fixed album edition grouping for versioned releases
- Added Hover to expand sidebar toggle in Settings
- Added app-wide middle-mouse autoscroll support
- Added automatic dismissal for the Lyrics color picker
- Added Collapse Album Editions setting
- Added Player Bar Opacity slider in Settings
- Improved scrollbar styling and behavior across the app
- Improved autoscroll speed, visuals, and indicator alignment
- Improved album edition handling and representative album selection
- Improved playback bar readability with adjustable background opacity
- Improved Settings integration for sidebar behavior and album edition preferences
- Improved code maintainability by consolidating album title normalization logic
- Improved dialog launching logic and removed duplicate implementations
Full Changelog: v1.1.12...v1.1.13
